topWPAPlays.description: Ceddanne Rafaela homers (6) on a fly ball to left field. Isiah Kiner-Falefa scores. Jarren Duran scores.

Caleb Durbin pops out to first baseman Jonathan Aranda in foul territory.

Leody Taveras strikes out swinging.
Jackson Holliday strikes out swinging and Leody Taveras caught stealing 2nd, catcher Mitch Garver to shortstop Cole Young to catcher Mitch Garver.

Gleyber Torres doubles (5) on a line drive to right fielder Austin Martin, deflected by center fielder Byron Buxton. Kevin McGonigle scores.
Josh Bell singles on a line drive to center fielder Zach McKinstry. Austin Martin scores. Brooks Lee to 2nd.
